basics.name: Ulysse Tassidis
basics.label: French Senior/Lead Software Engineer | Backend & Microservices Specialist (.NET/C#)
basics.summary: Software Engineer working in Paris with expertise in full-stack development using C#, .NET, and Angular. Strong background in leading development teams, building scalable microservices, and delivering high-quality software solutions.

work.name: WEDA (VIDAL Group)
work.summary: Led the Medical team (4-5 developers) on secure healthcare messaging (MSSanté v2) within Weda's EHR used by ~15,000 physicians. Joined during production instability and restored structure, delivery capacity, and reliability.
highlights: Crisis stabilization: Took over post-critical release with 40k+ Sentry errors, led root-cause analysis, hotfix strategy, and progressive quality improvements
Migration & delivery: Piloted MSSanté v1→v2 migration (API LPS, data migration, SQL linked-server removal) and delivered secretary delegation feature across incremental releases
Technical evolution: Contributed to gradual modernization from legacy .NET Framework to .NET 8 APIs while maintaining backward compatibility and system stability

Team & process: Established engineering standards (poker planning, INVEST stories, 2-reviewer PR policy, pre-grooming with POs) and provided technical mentorship through regular 1-to-1s and pair programming. Led recruitment process for new developers (job description, technical interviews)
Release ownership: Managed production releases, coordinated with Ops/DBA, monitored via Sentry/Graylog/Dynatrace
Strategic contribution: Led Ségur v2 macro-estimation (465 MD) and CDA compliance work with domain experts
Technologies: .NET Framework/.NET 8, Angular, SQL Server, Azure DevOps, Docker, Kubernetes, RabbitMQ, Redis, Sentry, Graylog, Dynatrace, Grafana/Prometheus

work.name: Bouygues Telecom
work.summary: Led a team of five developers to build full-stack applications within a microservices architecture, focusing on network performance and large-scale data challenges. Aggregated data from France's 2G, 3G, 4G, and 5G networks to calculate KPIs and provide visualizations and alerting tools.
highlights: Applied software craftsmanship principles (clean code, TDD) to ensure high-quality delivery
Collaborated with product owners and stakeholders to define requirements and deliver features
Technologies: .NET 6/8, Dapper, SQL Server, Angular 15, GitLab, Kubernetes, Grafana (Loki)

work.name: TEKenable Ltd (formerly Greenfinch Technology)
work.summary: Led mobile app development projects using Xamarin.Forms for iOS, Android and Windows platforms.
highlights: Managed App Store / Azure Cloud deployments, Azure DevOps (CI/CD), code reviews and onboarding processes
Participated in solution design and business analysis with clients/end users to define use cases, architecture, deployment strategy, and estimations

work.name: Greenfinch Technology
work.summary: Developed web and mobile applications using C# and Java technologies.
highlights: Developed applications using C# (.NET Core, Xamarin), Angular, Java (Spring, Hibernate) and MySQL
Used GitHub, Jira and Azure DevOps CI/CD tools for version control, issue tracking and continuous integration/delivery

work.name: IMEC Technologies
work.summary: Built cross-platform mobile applications and web applications.
highlights: Built cross-platform mobile applications using Xamarin and web applications using ASP.NET
Set up CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps and used MVVM patterns to unit test UI components

work.name: Lyli Association
work.summary: Taught English and fundraising in a school built by the association.
highlights: Taught English to children from 8 to 16 years old
Raised funds for the school and students

work.name: BNP Paribas
work.position: JAVA Developer → Business Analyst → Project Manager (Apprenticeship)
work.summary: 3-year dual apprenticeship within BNP Paribas, progressing through three roles across IT development, business analysis, and project management.
highlights: FIRST YEAR — JAVA Full Stack Developer: Built web applications using Spring MVC, Hibernate, Thymeleaf. Applied Agile Scrum with CI tools (GIT, Jenkins, Maven, Nexus). User story evaluation, use case design, test automation, bug fixing and maintenance

SECOND YEAR — Business Analyst, Operational Risks IS Redesign: Created, updated, and challenged the backlog, user stories, and MVP. Planned and facilitated users' workshops. Defined business processes and mockups
THIRD YEAR — Project Manager Assistant: Steering, monitoring, and coordination of a web application project. Estimated budget, risks, and planning

work.name: Multimedia Automatique Diffusion
work.summary: Participated in analysis, specification writing, and application development.
highlights: Participated in analysis and drafting of needs
Wrote technical specification details
Designed and developed applications using Symfony Framework

work.name: Temps Jeunes Association
work.summary: Organized departure and return of children from vacations.
highlights: Organized departure and return of children from vacations

education.summary: 3 years in a Dual apprenticeship system. Specialization in 3D Engineering with a lot of C# development with .Net and Unity framework.
A student exchange where I studied Chinese Mandarin and software engineering.

languages.summary: Certification TOEIC® with a score of 905. Lived and worked in Ireland for 2 years.

interests.name: Music
interests.summary: Musician from 2014 to 2018. Managed music band and organized performances for 4 years. Released two albums with more than thirty lives across France and England.

interests.name: Travel & Asian Culture
interests.summary: Passionate about Asian culture and travel. Traveled and organized trips across 8 Asian countries.

projects.name: Twitter like in Python / Flask framework
projects.summary: A Twitter-like website made with Flask (python framework), PostgreSQL, and Bootstrap. Organized with AGILE method and GIT. Made during year at BJTU with highest note.
highlights: Flask framework for backend
PostgreSQL database
Bootstrap for frontend styling
AGILE methodology and GIT version control

projects.name: Microsoft HoloLens Project / Unity C#
projects.summary: Augmented Reality gaming project conducted within ESIEE Paris for Artefact Event. Combines QR code detection, voice recognition, environmental control (room scan), and Unity.
highlights: QR code detection
Voice recognition
Environmental control and room scanning
Continuous HoloLens SDK updates adaptation

projects.name: Website - Empty House
projects.summary: Full-stack website project from conception to deployment, including design and development.
highlights: HTML5 / CSS3 and JQUERY
CSS framework Materialized
Website deployment and maintenance

projects.name: Android Wi-Fi Mapping Application
projects.summary: Research project to model and map Wi-Fi signals received with Android smartphones to identify white areas in coverage.
highlights: Android application development
Signal strength mapping and modeling
Algorithm research and optimization
Performance improvements
